title: berkheya hispida
intro: Berkheya hispida, also known as the African daisy or golden daisy, is a flowering plant species native to South Africa. It is a shrub-like perennial with yellow or white daisy-like flowers. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, due to the presence of bioactive compounds such as flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Berkheya hispida include reducing inflammation, fighting infections, and potentially lowering blood pressure, and it can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for consumption.
